title: Korean-Style Pork Belly Stir Fry
description: A sweet and spicy stir-fry made with pork belly, inspired by Korean cuisine.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the pork belly and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the sliced green onions and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the xenial stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, and red pepper flakes.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Return the pork belly to the skillet and cook until coated in the sauce, about 2-3 minutes.
